Bladesman's Axe  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 8.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Bladesman's Axe
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 8.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:7 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:24
Submitted By:Morgan Forsythe
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-11 05:31:02
Page Updated:Wed Jul 19th, 2017

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
a frost giant berserker
a storm giant gladiator

Korakaz
protector of Zek

Post Comment
Oops
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2003 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788299281
8 posts
Make that lvl 41 shaman...forgot to update it ;P
▲ Page top
Nice for Newbies
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2003 at 7:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788299281
8 posts
I went into the bazaar last night looking for a cheap 1h slashing just to work my skill up with. Bought it for 20pp. I'm a dwarven paladin and currently lvl 8. I definately can't complain about the dmg/dly. Very nice for my level. Hitting in the low teens nearly everytime. I'd recommend this for anyone on a budget to outfit a newbie slasher.
▲ Page top
lev 6
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2002 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774874864
11 posts
all i have to say is Rallos Zek bless the demand for cb belts, im level 6, and i have lots of money from going into cb and selling cb belts. I bought this for 20pp, and even thoough it doesnt have high dmg, the speed is hard to argue with, i may mis sometimes but i hit so many times it doesnt matter
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 13 2002 at 4:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) all i can say to this is NOOB ITEM!!!!!!!!! if you want those stats get wakizashi of frozen skies
Bye Bye Fatigue
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2001 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759795116
5 posts
Great weapon at 6/22, but dual wield/double attack as a warrior and watch your fatigue disappear. Esp if HASTED! Have your cleric keep zapping you with invigor and you will have no problem. I use this and silvery axe or walrus tusk in off hand. La Machine
▲ Page top
a decent weapon
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2001 at 7:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251374926
4 posts
i got this for 20pp at 16 i think and was a decent weapon til like 22 when i traded it for a berserker's sword. i outdamaged alot of others my levels when grouped with this and a dragon horn ykesha in the offhand.
▲ Page top
BARDS RULE
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 2:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761660928
1 post
This axe is very nice in my opinion a great combo for bards at lvl 17 and higher until they can afford the SSOY is to have this axe in primary and the bezerkers sword in secondary
▲ Page top
Dwarves...
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2001 at 3:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just got one of theese and a Shield of the slain unicorn, and I finally think that I LOOK like a real dwarven warrior as they are portrayed in fantasy fiction, at least as I understand or shall I say imagined them to be.
Nevertheless, I think that this is an excellent weapon, it is intimidating(its a one handed axe with the grafix of a 2 handed silvery axe) and has a good del/dam ratio.However it is completely heavy.
In my humble opinion this is a musy have for Dwarven warriors and pallys.
Later guys.

Drune
Warrior of the 18th notch
The Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
Best thing about it is look.
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2001 at 10:01 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When equipped this looks exactly the same as the Silvery 2H Axe. So looks like your swinging a 2H axe with 1H.
▲ Page top
This has got to be worth more
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2000 at 12:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
the price on the site is 40pp,it has to be worth more with the damage delay ratio like that
▲ Page top
RE: This has got to be worth more - Ah no it shouldn't
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2000 at 5:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751476105
38 posts
Look at the stats, as stated earlier all it is is another Silver War Axe or SWA. If you want to run out of STA while fighting go for it. Otherwise if it's only primary hand only then you're better off with a SWA, if your going for theme and 2 axes (hope you have hight STR) then get this, otherwise start shopping around.

Wrenn Whitehand
Human Cleric or Erollisi Marr
Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
RE: This has got to be worth more - Ah no it shouldn't
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2000 at 3:29 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i agree with Wrenn...its basically a Silvery War Axe but much, much heavier. unless it looks freakin awesome (like the war axes the dwarves carry) then its utter crap...well maybe not that bad, its pretty decent but its still newbie fodder. i bet they sell decent to a vendor, most of the dwarf vendors want insane prices to sell one to you(i want to say 8k but i cant be certain).

Jookar
Iksar Warrior of Cazic-Thule
Tarew Marr
